tasks.label: zabbix-smoke
args: from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; from main import app; c=TestClient(app); l=c.post('/api/v1/auth/login', json={'email':'admin@capdash.io','password':'Admin@123'}); print('login', l.status_code); h={'Authorization': f"Bearer {l.json()['access_token']}"}; r=c.get('/api/v1/platforms/zabbix/hosts?page=1&limit=5', headers=h); print('zabbix_hosts', r.status_code, r.json().get('total'), len(r.json().get('items',[]))); t=c.get('/api/v1/platforms/zabbix/triggers?page=1&limit=5', headers=h); print('zabbix_triggers', t.status_code, t.json().get('total'), len(t.json().get('items',[])))
